'''shachocho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cedarware|cedarware]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-ch-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cedarware|cedarware]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| shachocho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæchecheth|shæchecheth]] || [[word:shæchechej|shæchechej]] || [[word:shæchechesh|shæchechesh]] || [[word:shæcheche|shæcheche]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shachochochoth|shachochochoth]] || [[word:shachochochoj|shachochochoj]] || [[word:shachochochosh|shachochochosh]] || [[word:shachochocho|shachochocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shachochoth|shachochoth]] || [[word:shachochoj|shachochoj]] || [[word:shachochosh|shachochosh]] || [[word:shachocho|shachocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shachofchoth|shachofchoth]] || [[word:shachofchoj|shachofchoj]] || [[word:shachofchosh|shachofchosh]] || [[word:shachofchof|shachofchof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shachochotho|shachochotho]] || [[word:shachochojo|shachochojo]] || [[word:shachochosho|shachochosho]] || [[word:shachochoko|shachochoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shachochoth|shachochoth]] || [[word:shachochoj|shachochoj]] || [[word:shachochosh|shachochosh]] || [[word:shachocho|shachocho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shachochothol|shachochothol]] || [[word:shachochojol|shachochojol]] || [[word:shachochoshol|shachochoshol]] || [[word:shachochokol|shachochokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shachochothotho|shachochothotho]] || [[word:shachochojojo|shachochojojo]] || [[word:shachochoshosho|shachochoshosho]] || [[word:shachochoko|shachochoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shachochothon|shachochothon]] || [[word:shachochojon|shachochojon]] || [[word:shachochoshon|shachochoshon]] || [[word:shachochokon|shachochokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shachochothoro|shachochothoro]] || [[word:shachochojoro|shachochojoro]] || [[word:shachochoshoro|shachochoshoro]] || [[word:shachochokoro|shachochokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
